ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county associated with this demographic data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population of the county */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distribution" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the age distribution record */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated demographic data */,
  "under_5" INTEGER /* Population under 5 years old */,
  "age_5_9" INTEGER /* Population aged 5 to 9 years */,
  "age_10_14" INTEGER /* Population aged 10 to 14 years */,
  "age_15_19" INTEGER /* Population aged 15 to 19 years */,
  "age_20_24" INTEGER /* Population aged 20 to 24 years */,
  "age_25_29" INTEGER /* Population aged 25 to 29 years */,
  "age_30_34" INTEGER /* Population aged 30 to 34 years */,
  "age_35_39" INTEGER /* Population aged 35 to 39 years */,
  "age_40_44" INTEGER /* Population aged 40 to 44 years */,
  "age_45_49" INTEGER /* Population aged 45 to 49 years */,
  "age_50_54" INTEGER /* Population aged 50 to 54 years */,
  "age_55_59" INTEGER /* Population aged 55 to 59 years */,
  "age_60_64" INTEGER /* Population aged 60 to 64 years */,
  "age_65_69" INTEGER /* Population aged 65 to 69 years */,
  "age_70_74" INTEGER /* Population aged 70 to 74 years */,
  "age_75_79" INTEGER /* Population aged 75 to 79 years */,
  "age_80_84" INTEGER /* Population aged 80 to 84 years */,
  "age_85_plus" INTEGER /* Population aged 85 years and over */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the age distribution */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population in the age distribution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the age distribution data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year record */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_distribution" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gender distribution record */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated demographic data */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Count of males in the county */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Count of females in the county */,
  "male_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the male population */,
  "female_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the female population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the gender distribution data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_distribution_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trend record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the trend */,
  "population_change" INTEGER /* Change in population from the previous year */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in population from the previous year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county for the report */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed report data in text format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
